reviews.review_description: It’s so fun but I think there should be people that rob your store then you have to buy security and just make it abit harder I already made like 2 million in 20 minutes of playing but it’s good fun I’d recommend playing it for sure

reviews.review_title: One of my favourite games to play
reviews.review_description:
Don't listen to the bad reviews! in this game you can:
● Buy stuff
● Sell stuff
● Rent bigger places
● Level up
● And upgrade

This game is amazing and I recommend getting it

Stop listening to reviews, these people act like movie critics. If you don’t like it you can return it within 2 hours or some. Anyways, you can purchase more buildings to have a bigger inventory, some of the reviews haven’t played far enough or it was to hard. I have over $1,000,000 in the game.

I got kicked out of my store because the rent WASNT weekly but daily, and now everytime I load up the game it glitchs the controls then I fall through the floor. And I was actually having a alot of fun in the game. So that's a shame
It won’t even let me play the game if I try I fall trough the floor so fix it cause I can’t get a refund

reviews.review_title: Apparently this game has been abandoned.
reviews.review_description: I really kinda like this game, but it needs to have a bigger inventory because you can only hold four items in your inventory before it says that you can not hold anymore that your inventory is full. It seems like they sell and buy the same stuff over and over again. After you speak to 4 or 5 people, you have to press close store and then reopen and do the same thing over and over again. It gets kind of boring after a while, nothing new. I hope that with the next update that they give a much larger inventory, may be make it where as you don't have to close the store after four or five people and reopen. Overall, it's a good game, but fix those minor things such as the inventory , speaking to four or five people, and then closing and then reopening. Keep up the good work, guys. You did a great job. Sending positive vibes your way. I hope you're having a great day. Please stay safe🫡🙏🏻😎👍
